result.stdout:
GetVersion

Domino is a file watcher that runs a custom script when changes occur.

Usage: domino [options] [command]

Options:
  --version     Show version information
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  ignore        Adds file pattern to the .dominoignore
  start         Starts the file watcher.

Run 'domino [command] --help' for more information about a command.
